description.value: Aura faint abjuration; CL 5th; Slot shoulders; Price 10,000 gp; Weight 3 lbs. DESCRIPTION These steel pauldrons are engraved with images of charging bulls. When the wearer makes a bull rush combat maneuver, she can make the check twice and take the better result. Furthermore, they grant a +2 enhancement bonus to CMD against bull rushes. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, bullâs strength; Cost 5,000 gp.
